files_changed:
M	Dockerfile.worker
M	docker-entrypoint.sh
M	new-ui/src/api/hooks/use-agents.ts
patch:
diff --git a/Dockerfile.worker b/Dockerfile.worker
index cdf0bb0..205e987 100644
--- a/Dockerfile.worker
+++ b/Dockerfile.worker
@@ -20,40 +20,30 @@ ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
 # Use pipefail so pipe failures are caught
 SHELL ["/bin/bash", "-o", "pipefail", "-c"]
 
-# Install comprehensive development tools
+# Install all system packages in a single layer
+# Step 1: bootstrap curl/gnupg so we can add external apt repos
+# Step 2: add NodeSource + GitHub CLI repos, then install everything
 # NOTE: intentionally NOT using --no-install-recommends here — this is a full
 # dev environment where agents build arbitrary projects; recommended packages
 # (setuptools, wheel, less, dev headers, etc.) prevent subtle breakage.
-RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
-    # Essential tools
-    curl wget ca-certificates gnupg lsb-release \
-    # Version control
+RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl ca-certificates gnupg \
+    && curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - \
+    && curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
+       | dd of=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
+    && chmod go+r /usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
+    && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" \
+       | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list > /dev/null \
+    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
+    wget lsb-release \
     git git-lfs \
-    # Editors
     vim nano \
-    # Build tools
     build-essential make cmake gcc g++ \
-    # Python
     python3 python3-pip python3-venv \
-    # Common utilities
     jq tree htop unzip zip tar gzip sqlite3 \
-    # Network tools
     openssh-client \
-    # sudo for package installation
     sudo \
-    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
-
-# Install Node.js 22.x (LTS)
-RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - \
-    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs \
-    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
-
-# Install GitHub CLI
-RUN curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg | dd of=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
-    && chmod go+r /usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
-    && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list > /dev/null \
-    && apt-get update \
-    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gh \
+    nodejs \
+    gh \
     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
 
 # Install Bun (for running JS/TS projects)
@@ -80,6 +70,21 @@ ENV PATH="/home/worker/.bun/bin:$PATH"
 RUN HOME=/home/worker curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash
 ENV PATH="/home/worker/.local/bin:$PATH"
 
+# Install Claude marketplace plugins (build-time cache)
+RUN mkdir -p /home/worker/.claude \
+    && claude plugin marketplace add desplega-ai/ai-toolbox || true \
+    && claude plugin install desplega@desplega-ai-toolbox --scope user || true \
+    && claude plugin install agent-swarm@desplega-ai-toolbox --scope user || true \
+    && claude plugin install wts@desplega-ai-toolbox --scope user || true \
+    && claude plugin marketplace add desplega-ai/qa-use || true \
+    && claude plugin install qa-use@desplega.ai --scope user || true \
+    && claude plugin marketplace add mksglu/claude-context-mode || true \
+    && claude plugin install context-mode@claude-context-mode --scope user || true
+
+# Configure wts for agent mode (no tmux, no auto-Claude)
+RUN mkdir -p /home/worker/.wts \
+    && echo '{"defaults":{"autoTmux":false,"autoClaude":false}}' > /home/worker/.wts/config.json
+
 # Setup .claude directory and settings
 RUN mkdir -p /home/worker/.claude/commands /home/worker/.claude/agents \
     && echo '{"hasCompletedOnboarding":true,"bypassPermissionsModeAccepted":true}' > /home/worker/.claude.json \
@@ -97,21 +102,21 @@ RUN mkdir -p /home/worker/.claude/commands /home/worker/.claude/agents \
   } \
 }' > /home/worker/.claude/settings.json
 
-# Copy binary from builder
+# Install global npm tools (pinned versions for cache stability)
 USER root
-COPY --from=builder /build/agent-swarm /usr/local/bin/agent-swarm
-RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/agent-swarm
-
-# Install global tools (pinned versions, consolidated to reduce layers)
 RUN npm install -g \
     pm2@6.0.14 \
-    @sentry/cli@3.2.2 \
-    @desplega.ai/wts@latest \
-    @desplega.ai/localtunnel \
-    @desplega.ai/qa-use@latest \
+    @sentry/cli@3.3.0 \
+    @desplega.ai/wts@0.2.2 \
+    @desplega.ai/localtunnel@2.2.0 \
+    @desplega.ai/qa-use@2.8.7 \
     && qa-use install-deps
 
-# Copy commands
+# Copy binary from builder (changes on every code change — keep late)
+COPY --from=builder /build/agent-swarm /usr/local/bin/agent-swarm
+RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/agent-swarm
+
+# Copy commands (changes on code change — keep late)
 COPY --chown=worker:worker plugin/commands/* /home/worker/.claude/commands/
 COPY --chown=worker:worker plugin/agents/* /home/worker/.claude/agents/
 COPY --chown=worker:worker plugin/skills/ /home/worker/.claude/skills/
@@ -123,9 +128,13 @@ RUN chmod +x /docker-entrypoint.sh
 
 USER worker
 WORKDIR /workspace
-VOLUME ["/logs"]
 
-RUN mkdir -p ./personal ./shared
+# Create static workspace directories (build-time)
+RUN mkdir -p /workspace/personal /workspace/shared/thoughts/shared/plans \
+    /workspace/shared/thoughts/shared/research \
+    /workspace/personal/memory /workspace/shared/memory
+
+VOLUME ["/logs"]
 VOLUME ["/workspace/personal", "/workspace/shared"]
 
 # Expose service port for PM2 processes
diff --git a/docker-entrypoint.sh b/docker-entrypoint.sh
index e36f4f4..ccef938 100644
--- a/docker-entrypoint.sh
+++ b/docker-entrypoint.sh
@@ -113,37 +113,26 @@ fi
 
 # Create .mcp.json in /workspace (project-level config)
 echo "Creating MCP config in /workspace..."
+# Build base MCP config with jq
+MCP_JSON=$(jq -n \
+  --arg url "${MCP_URL}/mcp" \
+  --arg apiKey "Bearer ${API_KEY}" \
+  '{mcpServers: {"agent-swarm": {type: "http", url: $url, headers: {Authorization: $apiKey}}}}')
+
+# Add X-Agent-ID header if set
 if [ -n "$AGENT_ID" ]; then
-    cat > /workspace/.mcp.json << EOF
-{
-  "mcpServers": {
-    "agent-swarm": {
-      "type": "http",
-      "url": "${MCP_URL}/mcp",
-      "headers": {
-        "Authorization": "Bearer ${API_KEY}",
-        "X-Agent-ID": "${AGENT_ID}"
-      }
-    }
-  }
-}
-EOF
-else
-    cat > /workspace/.mcp.json << EOF
-{
-  "mcpServers": {
-    "agent-swarm": {
-      "type": "http",
-      "url": "${MCP_URL}/mcp",
-      "headers": {
-        "Authorization": "Bearer ${API_KEY}"
-      }
-    }
-  }
-}
-EOF
+    MCP_JSON=$(echo "$MCP_JSON" | jq --arg agentId "$AGENT_ID" \
+      '.mcpServers["agent-swarm"].headers["X-Agent-ID"] = $agentId')
+fi
+
+# Add agentmail-mcp if API key is present
+if [ -n "$AGENTMAIL_API_KEY" ]; then
+    MCP_JSON=$(echo "$MCP_JSON" | jq --arg key "$AGENTMAIL_API_KEY" \
+      '.mcpServers.agentmail = {command: "npx", args: ["-y", "agentmail-mcp"], env: {AGENTMAIL_API_KEY: $key}}')
 fi
 
+echo "$MCP_JSON" > /workspace/.mcp.json
+
 # Configure GitHub authentication if token is provided
 echo ""
 echo "=== GitHub Authentication ==="
@@ -211,36 +200,6 @@ else
 fi
 echo "==============================="
 
-# Install the desplega-ai marketplace
-echo ""
-echo "=== Marketplace Installation ==="
-
-if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
-    echo "Installing desplega-ai/ai-toolbox marketplace..."
-    claude plugin marketplace add desplega-ai/ai-toolbox || echo "Toolbox marketplace add failed, continuing..."
-
-    echo "Installing plugins from desplega-ai-toolbox..."
-    claude plugin install desplega@desplega-ai-toolbox --scope user || echo "Plugin install failed, continuing..."
-    claude plugin install agent-swarm@desplega-ai-toolbox --scope user || echo "Plugin install failed, continuing..."
-    claude plugin install wts@desplega-ai-toolbox --scope user || echo "Plugin install failed, continuing..."
-
-    echo "Installing desplega-ai/qa-use marketplace..."
-    claude plugin marketplace add desplega-ai/qa-use || echo "qa-use marketplace add failed, continuing..."
-
-    echo "Installing plugins from desplega.ai..."
-    claude plugin install qa-use@desplega.ai --scope user || echo "Plugin install failed, continuing..."
-
-    echo "Installing context-mode plugin..."
-    claude plugin marketplace add mksglu/claude-context-mode || echo "context-mode marketplace add failed, continuing..."
-    claude plugin install context-mode@claude-context-mode --scope user || echo "context-mode plugin install failed, continuing..."
-
-    echo "Marketplace installation completed"
-else
-    echo "WARNING: claude CLI not found, skipping marketplace installation"
-fi
-echo "==============================="
-
-
 
 # Find existing startup script in /workspace (start-up.sh, .bash, .js, .ts, .bun, or bare)
 find_startup_script() {
@@ -420,21 +379,8 @@ fi
 echo ""
 echo "=== Workspace Initialization ==="
 
-# Configure wts for agent use (no tmux, no auto-Claude)
-echo "Configuring wts for agent mode..."
-mkdir -p /home/worker/.wts
-cat > /home/worker/.wts/config.json << EOF
-{
-  "defaults": {
-    "autoTmux": false,
-    "autoClaude": false
-  }
-}
-EOF
-
+# Create todos.md if it doesn't exist
 PERSONAL_DIR="/workspace/personal"
-mkdir -p "$PERSONAL_DIR"
-
 if [ ! -f "$PERSONAL_DIR/todos.md" ]; then
     echo "Creating personal todos.md..."
     cat > "$PERSONAL_DIR/todos.md" << EOF
@@ -447,26 +393,15 @@ else
     echo "Personal todo.md already exists, skipping creation"
 fi
 
-SHARED_DIR="/workspace/shared/thoughts"
-
-# Create shared thoughts directories
+# Create agent-specific thoughts directories (requires AGENT_ID at runtime)
 if [ -n "$AGENT_ID" ]; then
+    SHARED_DIR="/workspace/shared/thoughts"
     AGENT_THOUGHTS_DIR="$SHARED_DIR/$AGENT_ID"
     echo "Creating shared thoughts directories for agent ID $AGENT_ID..."
     mkdir -p "$AGENT_THOUGHTS_DIR/plans"
     mkdir -p "$AGENT_THOUGHTS_DIR/research"
 fi
 
-# shared always
-echo "Creating shared thoughts directories..."
-mkdir -p "$SHARED_DIR/shared/plans"
-mkdir -p "$SHARED_DIR/shared/research"
-
-# Memory directories (auto-indexed by PostToolUse hook)
-echo "Creating memory directories..."
-mkdir -p "$PERSONAL_DIR/memory"
-mkdir -p "/workspace/shared/memory"
-
 echo "==============================="
 echo ""
 
diff --git a/new-ui/src/api/hooks/use-agents.ts b/new-ui/src/api/hooks/use-agents.ts
index 9ccf378..37cad68 100644
--- a/new-ui/src/api/hooks/use-agents.ts
+++ b/new-ui/src/api/hooks/use-agents.ts
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ export function useAgents(includeTasks = false) {
 export function useAgent(id: string) {
   return useQuery({
     queryKey: ["agent", id],
-    queryFn: () => api.fetchAgent(id),
+    queryFn: () => api.fetchAgent(id, false),
     enabled: !!id,
   });
 }

_review.note: Exact tool_replay, 0 warnings; diff counts (3 files, +66/-122) match metadata; all 3 files referenced in test.sh.
